# Tatva by Tradeprop
Premium luxury plots and signature villas near Nal Sarovar, Sanand, Gujarat.

## Project Details
- **Location**: Sanand-Nal Sarovar Road, Gujarat, India.
- **Distance**: 8 km from Nal Sarovar Bird Sanctuary.
- **Offerings**: NA/NOC title-clear premium residential plots and signature modern villas.
- **Pricing**: Plots starting from ₹11 Lakhs, Villas from ₹35 Lakhs.
- **Project Concept**: A luxury real estate investment and lakeside living ecosystem. Not just a resort, but an established community featuring exclusive plots for custom home building and ready-to-move signature villas. Includes an internal world-class club.
